text:
Harold was a news reporter at Channel 58 during the events of "Rick Potion 9". He was turned into a Mantis-person before turning into a Cronenberg, like the rest of the human race.

Harold worked at Channel 58 for its breaking news update, which interfered with Summer watching Pregnant Baby. He and his co-host reported that Morty's whereabouts were still unknown before expressing their "love" for him, which resulted in a fight between them.

Harold's replacement version is assumed to have remained human, as the originals Rick and Morty have managed to ward off the disaster.
